x-enumeration-literals.name: Origination Eligibility Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Conditions that the customer must meet to obtain the product.

Comment:
Example: Minimum age 18, minimum income €2,000/month.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Origination Financial Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Define interest rates, fees, repayment schedules, and limits.

Comment:
Example: Loan interest = 5% annually, monthly installment €500.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Origination Collateral Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Requirements for securing the product, if applicable.

Comment:
Example: Mortgage loan requires property as collateral.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Origination Compliance Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Regulatory and KYC obligations.

Comment:
Example: Customer must submit proof of identity and address.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Origination Event-Based Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Conditions that trigger specific actions during the product lifecycle.

Comment:
Example: Loan repayment due date triggers automatic debit from the customers account.
